objective: Validated the Cargo workspace refactor against all 11 acceptance criteria from the PLAN
key_changes: PASS: Workspace root Cargo.toml contains only [workspace] section (no [package])
PASS: cli/Cargo.toml has full package metadata with name=grove
PASS: src/ removed from repo root; cli/src/ contains all 8 source files
PASS: tests/ removed from repo root; cli/tests/ exists with cli.rs
PASS: cargo build --release --locked succeeds, binary at target/release/grove
PASS: cargo test --release --locked passes all 134 tests (117 unit + 17 CLI)
PASS: scripts/bump-version.sh targets cli/Cargo.toml for version field
PASS: Cargo.lock at root, not duplicated in cli/
PASS: DEV_REGISTRY path fix uses /../registry (correct from cli/)
PASS: [profile.release] in workspace root where Cargo honours it
